description: State document(s). Verso seems to be the bottom of a petition with a reference to "ṣadaqa ʿan mawlānā" followed by a raʾy clause and ḥamdala. Recto may be the rescript. One line is partially preserved followed by the ḥamdala and ṣalwala.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
